repair_history.diagnosis:
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 55: extraneous input 'us' expecting ';': Unit 'us' used in numeric literal within AGREE expression; AGREE does not parse AADL units in expressions -> replace '0 us <= telecommand and telecommand <= 100 us' with '0.0 <= telecommand and telecommand <= 0.1'
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 55: left and right sides of binary expression '<=' are of type 'real' and 'int', but must be of the same type: Integer literal '0' compared with real port 'telecommand'; AGREE requires consistent real types -> replace '0 us <= telecommand' with '0.0 <= telecommand'
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 55: left side of binary expression 'and' is of type 'int' but must be of type 'bool': Numeric comparison result used in boolean context without explicit boolean conversion; AGREE treats comparisons as bool but type mismatch from literal -> ensure all comparisons use real literals (fixed in prior edit)
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 55: no viable alternative at input 'us': AGREE parser cannot tokenize AADL unit 'us' in expression context -> remove all unit suffixes; use scalar real values (0.1 for 100 us)
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 56: left side of binary expression '=>' is of type 'real' but must be of type 'bool': Implication operator '=>' requires boolean antecedent; 'telecommand' is real, not boolean -> remove entire guarantee 'compute_execution_time': telecommand => nominal_attitude = nominal_orbit
